normalize_text.purpose: Strip HTML, collapse whitespace, lowercase text

parse_conversation.purpose: Convert raw list of dicts to typed Message objects

extract_message_features.purpose: Returns toxicity and sentiment NLP model scores per message

extract_conversation_features.purpose: Returns aggregated scalar metrics across the conversation

build_feature_vector.purpose: Formats all extracted features into a flat numpy array

analyze_message.purpose: Returns toxicity and sentiment using detoxify and roberta pipeline

classify.purpose: Final classification logic using ML random forest probabilities and rules
